name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Niobec Project in North America dated February 2009.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Niobec Project in North America dated February 2009.pdf
document.description: This report provides an independent review of the niobium mineral resource and reserve estimation of the Niobec mine in Quebec, Canada for IAMGOLD Corporation, as of December 31, 2008.
